{{Infobox religious building

| mapframe-zoom = 15

{{nihongo|'''Wakinoni- Shrine'''|和伎坐天乃夫支賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wakinoni- Shrine'''|和伎坐天乃夫支賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wakinoni- Shrine'''|和伎坐天乃夫支賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 和伎坐天乃夫支賣神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes

{{nihongo|'''Wakinoni- Shrine'''|和伎坐天乃夫支賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wakinoni- Shrine'''|和伎坐天乃夫支賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wakinoni- Shrine'''|和伎坐天乃夫支賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Wakinoni- Shrine'''|和伎坐天乃夫支賣神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].
